mystery.list_subtitle: Solve mysteries to test your reading and listening comprehension
mystery.no_mysteries_desc: Check back soon for new mysteries in your language.
onboarding.how_1_html: Choose between listening tests (audio first, transcript shown after) or reading tests (text on screen from the start)
onboarding.how_2: Each test has 5 multiple-choice questions with 4 options, giving you clear, targeted feedback
onboarding.how_3: As you complete tests, LinguaDojo adapts to your level and recommends material that fits your ability
onboarding.lang_desc: Switch the site interface language to navigate in your preferred language. More interface languages coming soon.
onboarding.profile_desc: View your ELO rating, track progress over time, and see your test history. Watch how your skills improve with practice.
onboarding.report_desc: Use the flag icon to report issues, bad translations, or suggest improvements. Your feedback helps improve test quality for everyone.
onboarding.tagline: Master any language with active practice
onboarding.what_1: Improve foreign language skills through short, active exercises instead of passive study
onboarding.what_2: Answer focused comprehension tests designed for translators, exam preparation, and serious learners
onboarding.what_3: Each test is calibrated with an ELO rating so you are matched with challenges that fit your level
pinyin.error.no_chars: No playable characters found in this passage.
pinyin.error.no_data: This test does not have pinyin data. Please try a different Chinese test.
pinyin.error.title: Error
pinyin.title: Pinyin Tone Trainer
pitch.class.atamadaka_desc: Drop after mora 1. The first mora is high, everything after is low.
pitch.class.heiban_desc: No drop. Pitch rises after mora 1 and stays high - even on the following particle.
pitch.class.nakadaka_desc: Drop somewhere in the middle. Mora 1 is low, then high, then drops back to low.
pitch.class.odaka_desc: Drop falls on the boundary - only audible when a particle follows.
pitch.contour.instruction: Click HIGH or LOW for each mora. Then press Enter.
pitch.error.mora1_eq_mora2: Mora 1 and mora 2 must differ in pitch.
pitch.error.multiple_drops: A Japanese word has at most one H->L drop.
pitch.error.no_data: No pitch accent data is available for this test yet.
pitch.error.no_words: No drillable words found in this passage.
pitch.error.rise_after_drop: Pitch cannot rise again after it has fallen.
pitch.error.title: Error
pitch.error.wrong_drop: Close - your contour is valid, but the drop is in the wrong place.
pitch.explain.heiban: no drop; pitch stays high after the first mora (including any following particle).
pitch.explain.odaka_particle: - the drop only becomes audible because of the following particle.
pitch.title: Pitch Accent Trainer

study_plan.flag_disabled.banner: Preview mode. The Study Plan orchestrator is currently disabled (Config.STUDY_PLAN_ENABLED = False). You can edit the plan here, but the legacy daily-load is still running. Plan-driven daily sessions activate when the flag is flipped.
study_plan.no_plan.hint: Pick a starting bucket — you can fine-tune everything below afterwards.
study_plan.no_plan.intro: You don't have a Study Plan for this language yet.
study_plan.no_week_yet: No weekly state yet — will be computed by the Sunday 23:00 UTC cron, or click "Recompute" above.
study_plan.overrides.hint: Multiply the value of each skill in the weekly allocator. Default 1.00; range 0.5–2.0.
study_plan.overrides.title: Per-skill weight overrides
study_plan.recompute_disabled: Recompute is disabled while STUDY_PLAN_ENABLED is False.
study_plan.subtitle: Set your weekly time targets — the system adapts the daily mix.
study_plan.targets.heading: Per-skill targets vs completed
study_plan.template.created: Plan created. Adjust below and save when ready.
study_plan.template.hint: Changing the template resets daily_minutes; weekday shape and overrides are preserved.
